analysis —
law dormancy is the cold-requiring quiescent gate of the [[perennial]]'s recurring [[season]] — a cultivar must accumulate its chilling requirement (chill hours) before bud-break releases the next crop; it re-awakens the standing plant, it never re-instantiates it.
